question: Based on the two maps, what can be concluded about overall unemployment levels among youth compared with the overall population across U.S. states?

options.A: Youth unemployment tends to have higher levels overall across states
options.B: Overall unemployment tends to have higher levels overall across states
options.C: It cannot be determined from these maps alone
options.D: Both types have very similar overall levels across states

explanation: Both maps reuse the same threshold scale, but their underlying distributions differ. This can make one map appear more intense simply because more states fall into the top bin. In the underlying data, Youth Unemployment has the higher average value, so that is the only reliable conclusion.
